summary: Loan dispute between business partners. Borrower unable to repay full amount due to business failure. Mediated settlement at 70% with 18-month installment plan.
resolution: Partial payment of 70% in installments

summary: Boundary dispute between neighbors over 2 feet encroachment. Survey conducted, compromise on shared access pathway with registered boundary agreement.
resolution: Shared access with registered boundary

summary: Tenant refused to vacate after lease expiry. Landlord sought eviction plus damages. Settled with 3-month extension and repair compensation.
resolution: Tenant vacated with 3-month extension, Rs 50000 repair compensation

summary: Consumer complaint about defective electronic product. Manufacturer offered replacement but consumer sought refund. Settled with full refund plus compensation.
resolution: Full refund + Rs 10000 compensation

summary: Service contract breach. Provider failed to deliver as per timeline. Client sought damages. Settled at 50% refund with completion guarantee.
resolution: 50% refund + completion within 30 days

summary: Disputed inherited property between siblings. Elder sibling claimed sole ownership, younger produced will. Court-referred mediation led to equal partition.
resolution: Equal partition with compensation for improvements

summary: Wrongful termination claim. Employee terminated without notice. Employer cited performance issues. Settled with 3 months salary and relieving letter.
resolution: 3 months salary compensation + relieving letter

summary: Family property dispute after father's death. Three children disagreed on distribution. Mediated to proportional shares based on dependency and contribution.
resolution: Proportional distribution based on contribution

summary: Noise complaint between apartment neighbors. Late night music causing disturbance. Mediated agreement on quiet hours and soundproofing.
resolution: Agreed quiet hours 10PM-7AM, partial soundproofing cost shared

summary: Personal loan of Rs 3 lakhs unpaid for 2 years. Borrower faced medical emergency. Settled with reduced amount and 12-month plan.
resolution: Rs 2.5 lakhs in 12 monthly installments

summary: Builder delayed possession by 18 months. Buyer sought refund with interest. RERA mediation led to possession with compensation.
resolution: Possession within 3 months + Rs 5 lakh compensation

summary: Wedding venue cancelled booking 2 weeks before event. Couple sought damages for alternative arrangements. Settled with full refund plus additional compensation.
resolution: Full refund + Rs 1 lakh compensation for inconvenience

summary: Commercial tenant disputed rent increase of 40%. Landlord cited market rates. Mediated to 20% increase with 3-year lock-in.
resolution: 20% rent increase with 3-year lock-in period

summary: Online purchase fraud. Customer paid Rs 45000 for laptop, received counterfeit. E-commerce platform initially denied responsibility. Full refund ordered.
resolution: Full refund + Rs 5000 compensation + platform warning
winning_arguments: E-commerce liability under Consumer Protection Act

summary: Agricultural land boundary dispute between two farmers. Revenue records unclear. Joint survey with GPS mapping resolved the boundary with buffer zone.
resolution: GPS-mapped boundary with 1-meter buffer zone

summary: Salary arrears of 4 months for IT employee. Company faced cash flow issues. Settled with full payment in 2 installments plus experience certificate.
resolution: Full salary in 2 installments + experience certificate

summary: Gold loan default. Borrower couldn't repay Rs 8 lakhs. Bank threatened auction. Mediated 6-month extension with partial payment schedule.
resolution: 6-month extension with Rs 1.5 lakh monthly payments

summary: Mother's jewelry distribution dispute between daughters. No will existed. Mediated equal distribution with sentimental items allocated by preference.
resolution: Equal value distribution with sentimental preference allocation

summary: Water seepage from upstairs flat causing damage. Upstairs owner denied responsibility. Building society mediation led to shared repair cost.
resolution: 60-40 cost sharing for waterproofing repair

summary: Freelance developer not paid for completed website. Client claimed unsatisfactory work. Independent review showed 85% completion. Proportional payment ordered.
resolution: 85% of agreed amount paid within 15 days

summary: Defamation case over social media posts. Defendant posted false business reviews. Settled with post removal, public apology, and nominal compensation.
resolution: Post removal + public apology + Rs 25000 compensation
